title: Allrecipes
body: Allrecipes.com, Inc. is a food-focused online social networking service headquartered in Seattle, Washington. The company was founded by University of Washington archaeology students Tim Hunt, Carl Lipo, Mark Madsen, Michael Pfeffer, David Quinn, and Dan Shepherd.
categories: Articles with unsourced statements from April 2025
Official website different in Wikidata and Wikipedia
Short description is different from Wikidata
